prompt: Trap: tournament context can reduce raise frequency; use pressure cues to choose the best action.
why_v1: Raise applies pressure when risk premium and stack context support aggression.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raising fits the tournament cue set, so the line uses pressure only when the read gives you a real leverage edge.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Raising works better when bubble pressure, stack context, and fold equity line up to punish capped continues. A passive line leaves too much leverage unused, while the raise turns your tournament pressure into immediate folds or a cleaner value path.
